reframe: free-only diversity probe; baseline (Arm A) is a single FREE model, NOT Claude (no paid budget) -> this is NOT council-vs-Claude
decision_rule: survivors<min_survivors OR abs(catch_delta)<mde -> underpowered; else catch & cry-wolf up -> tradeoff-signal-to-investigate; demonstrated/refuted definitionally unreachable at n=2
note: ONE run, no re-roll (no re-running until survivors); free-tier reachability is intermittent so the model set is the one reachable at run time; the council-union flag-volume asymmetry (council unions up to N model flag-sets vs the baseline's single set) must be disclosed as fair scope
